title: Property Laws
meta_desc: Complete guide to property laws in Pakistan including Transfer of Property Act, Registration Act, Stamp Duty and Rent Agreement rules.
content:
Pakistan Property Laws Guide

Understanding property laws in Pakistan is essential before buying, selling or renting any property. Below are the key laws every buyer and tenant should know.

1. Transfer of Property Act 1882

The main law governing property transfers in Pakistan. Any sale of immovable property must be done through a registered deed.

2. Registration Act 1908

All property sale agreements must be registered with the Sub-Registrar office. An unregistered sale deed has no legal standing in court.

3. Stamp Duty (Sindh)

Stamp duty is 3% of property value for sale deeds in Sindh. It must be paid before registration.

4. Rent Agreement (Karachi)

A rent agreement should clearly state the monthly rent, duration, advance payment, and terms for termination. It should be signed on stamp paper with two witnesses.

5. Capital Gains Tax (CGT)

If you sell a property within a certain period of purchase, Capital Gains Tax applies. The rate depends on how long you held the property.

6. Benami Property Act

Holding property in someone else name (benami) is illegal in Pakistan and can result in confiscation of the property.

title: Karachi Area Guide
meta_desc: Complete guide to Karachi residential areas with rent ranges and sale prices for Akhtar Colony, Gulshan, DHA, Clifton and more.
content:
Karachi Area Guide

A complete guide to Karachi main residential areas with rent ranges, prices and comparisons.

Akhtar Colony
Middle Class

Quiet residential area with good community feel.

Rent: Rs. 15,000 - 45,000/month
Sale: Rs. 60 Lakh - 2 Crore
Best for: Families, Middle class
Near: Liaquatabad, North Nazimabad
Our Office Here
Gulshan-e-Iqbal
Upper Middle

Well developed area with good schools and hospitals.

Rent: Rs. 25,000 - 80,000/month
Sale: Rs. 1.5 - 5 Crore
Best for: Families, Professionals
Near: University Road, Johar More
North Nazimabad
Middle Class

Well planned peaceful residential area.

Rent: Rs. 20,000 - 60,000/month
Sale: Rs. 80 Lakh - 3 Crore
Best for: Families
Near: Nazimabad, Buffer Zone
DHA (Defence)
Premium

Best security, wide roads and prestigious address.

Rent: Rs. 50,000 - 3,00,000/month
Sale: Rs. 3 - 20 Crore+
Best for: High income, Business owners
Near: Clifton, Korangi
Nazimabad
Affordable

Established area with good transport links.

Rent: Rs. 12,000 - 35,000/month
Sale: Rs. 50 Lakh - 1.5 Crore
Best for: Budget conscious families
Near: North Nazimabad, Liaquatabad
Clifton
Premium

Sea view, prestigious address with international standard facilities.

Rent: Rs. 60,000 - 5,00,000/month
Sale: Rs. 4 - 30 Crore+
Best for: Elite, Business executives
Near: DHA, Saddar
